grid_endemicas.role: Critical-gap enrichment source; no stable cell_id available.

extinction_risk_analysis.role: Species-level risk and rediscovery hypothesis source.

current_priority_cells.role: Existing MapLibre priority layer used for state/threat/endemic aliases.

current_gbif_memory.role: Existing sampled GBIF memory point layer.

external_source_labels.GBIF: Occurrence evidence, already processed in project outputs.
external_source_labels.MapBiomas: Land-cover change metrics, already processed in project outputs.
external_source_labels.WorldClim: Richness-deficit covariate source, already processed in project outputs.
external_source_labels.Flora e Funga do Brasil: Endemism/risk context, already processed in project outputs where available.
